nasb.text: Its grain offering shall then be two-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil, an offering by fire to the Lord  for a soothing aroma, with its drink offering, a fourth of a hin of wine.

esv.text: And the grain offering with it shall be two tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil, a food offering to the Lord with a pleasing aroma, and the drink offering with it shall be of wine, a fourth of a hin.

cnv.text: 同獻的素祭，是調油的細麵兩公斤，獻給耶和華作馨香的火祭；同獻的奠祭，是一公斤酒。

ccb.text: 同时要把两公斤调油的细面粉作素祭，一起献给耶和华作馨香的火祭，也要献一升酒作奠祭。
